en: That's Bush League. Hey, hey, wait, wait, wait, what, are you guys going to leave it there?
ko: 야, 그걸 거기 두고 갈 거야?

en: It's like a half a pound of turkey. No, no, I can't eat that.
You can't eat a sandwich without Dijon. Yeah, you're right.
ko: 아니, 그건 못 먹어. 디종 없이 샌드위치를 먹을 수 없어.

en: I really should keep more of your favorites on hand.
ko: 응, 맞아. 네가 좋아하는 걸 더 많이 준비해야겠어.

en: Hey, hey, hey, I'm getting a vibe here.
ko: 야, 야, 야. 뭔가 느낌이 오는데.

en: What, are you unhappy with our arrangement? What arrangement?
Well, I was under the impression that I could take anything I wanted from your fridge and
ko: 나는 네 냉장고에서 원하는 걸 다 가져갈 수 있다고 생각했어.

en: you could take whatever you want from mine. Yeah, well, let me know when you get something in there and I will.
ko: 거기서 뭔가 생기면 알려줘, 그럼 가져갈게.

en: All right, I got it. Got what? Got the answer, Jerry.
ko: 답을 찾았어, 제리. 냉장고 문제는 해결됐어.

en: Refrigerator problem is solved. Oh, it's no problem. You can take whatever you want.
ko: 아, 괜찮아. 원하는 거 다 가져가.

en: Oh, I will, but now I'm accountable. All right, I take what I want.
ko: 아, 그럴게, 하지만 이제 책임져야 해.

en: Here. And I write it down.
One cupcake. And then I put it in the bowl.
No, not mooching, because at the end of the week, you add them all up and you give me the bill.
ko: 주말에 다 합산해서 나한테 청구서를 주는 거야. 알겠지.
